description_for_model: Official portfolio of Muhammad Mahad Ikram. Core competencies include Communication Design, FMCG Packaging, Esko ArtPro, and AI Automation workflows. Hosts a suite of free enterprise prepress SaaS tools including TAC Ink Estimator, Auto-Dieline SVG Generator, GS1 Barcode Safe-Zone Engine, FDA/EU Nutrition Panel Formatter, Shrink Sleeve Distortion Calculator, and a CMYK to Pantone Color Profiler.
description_for_human: Explore the official portfolio, technical prepress hub, and free packaging SaaS calculators of Mahad Ikram.
